mapper.sql: id, card_no AS cardNo, dahua_seq AS dahuaSeq, dahua_person_code AS dahuaPersonCode, aro_user_id AS aroUserId, card_status AS cardStatus, freeze_exempt_flag AS freezeExemptFlag, freeze_exempt_grant_date AS freezeExemptGrantDate, exempt_granted_at AS exemptGrantedAt, freeze_exempt_expire_at AS freezeExemptExpireAt, last_modified_time AS lastModifiedTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_card_mapping (card_no, dahua_seq, dahua_person_code, aro_user_id, card_status, freeze_exempt_flag, last_modified_time) VALUES (#{cardNo}, #{dahuaSeq}, #{dahuaPersonCode}, #{aroUserId}, #{cardStatus}, #{freezeExemptFlag}, #{lastModifiedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = #{flag}, freeze_exempt_grant_date = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN CURDATE() ELSE NULL END, exempt_granted_at = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, freeze_exempt_expire_at = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN #{expireAt} ELSE NULL END, last_modified_time = #{updateTime} WHERE card_no = #{cardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.card_no AS cardNo, m.dahua_seq AS dahuaSeq, m.dahua_person_code AS dahuaPersonCode, m.aro_user_id AS aroUserId, m.card_status AS cardStatus, m.freeze_exempt_flag AS freezeExemptFlag, m.freeze_exempt_grant_date AS freezeExemptGrantDate, m.exempt_granted_at AS exemptGrantedAt, m.freeze_exempt_expire_at AS freezeExemptExpireAt, m.last_modified_time AS lastModifiedTime, p.name AS userName, p.job_number AS jobNumber, p.project_group_name AS projectGroupName FROM twin_card_mapping m LEFT JOIN aro_personnel p ON m.aro_user_id = p.user_id ORDER BY m.last_modified_time DESC
SELECT user_id FROM aro_access_log WHERE create_time LIKE #{todayPrefix} GROUP BY user_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN accessType = 1 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) > 0
SELECT aro_user_id FROM twin_card_mapping WHERE freeze_exempt_grant_date = CURDATE() AND (freeze_exempt_flag IS NULL OR freeze_exempt_flag != 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = #{flag}, freeze_exempt_grant_date = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN CURDATE() ELSE NULL END, exempt_granted_at = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, freeze_exempt_expire_at = CASE WHEN #{flag} = 1 THEN #{expireAt} ELSE NULL END, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE aro_user_id = #{aroUserId}

UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = 0, freeze_exempt_grant_date = NULL, exempt_granted_at = NULL, freeze_exempt_expire_at = NULL WHERE freeze_exempt_flag = 1 AND (freeze_exempt_grant_date IS NULL OR freeze_exempt_grant_date < CURDATE())
UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = 0, freeze_exempt_expire_at = NULL, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE freeze_exempt_flag = 1

UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = 0, freeze_exempt_grant_date = NULL, exempt_granted_at = NULL, freeze_exempt_expire_at = NULL WHERE freeze_exempt_flag = 1 AND (freeze_exempt_grant_date IS NULL OR freeze_exempt_grant_date < CURDATE()) AND aro_user_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM aro_access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND is_keep_card = 1 )

UPDATE twin_card_mapping SET freeze_exempt_flag = 0, freeze_exempt_grant_date = NULL, exempt_granted_at = NULL, freeze_exempt_expire_at = NULL, last_modified_time = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE freeze_exempt_flag = 1 AND freeze_exempt_expire_at IS NOT NULL AND freeze_exempt_expire_at <= NOW()
